languages.text: {n}Выслушав вас, Ювенна буднично бросает:{/n} "Сержант, избавьтесь от них".
languages.translation_comment:
Ювенна в воксе
приводит к бою с меровцами; DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter +7 и стартуют DL_JuvennaSuspicionTraitor и DL_ConspiracyDenied

traits.locale_text: {n}Выслушав вас, Ювенна буднично бросает:{/n} "Сержант, избавьтесь от них".

languages.translation_comment:
Ювенна в воксе
приводит к бою с меровцами; DL_JuvennaSuspicion_counter +7 и стартуют DL_JuvennaSuspicionTraitor и DL_ConspiracyDenied

languages.text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."
languages.original_text: {n}Выслушав вас, Ювенна буднично бросает:{/n} "Сержант, избавьтесь от них".

traits.locale_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."
{n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."
{n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

languages.text: {n}听完你的话，尤文娜淡淡地说道：{/n}“军士，把他们处理掉。”
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}听完你的话，尤文娜淡淡地说道：{/n}“军士，把他们处理掉。”

languages.text: {n}Après vous avoir {mf|écouté|écoutée}, Juvenna ordonne sur un ton neutre :{/n} « Sergent, débarrassez-vous d'eux. »
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après vous avoir {mf|écouté|écoutée}, Juvenna ordonne sur un ton neutre :{/n} « Sergent, débarrassez-vous d'eux. »

languages.text: {n}Seni dinleyen Juvenna, soğukkanlı bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Çavuş, kurtul gitsin şundan."
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seni dinleyen Juvenna, soğukkanlı bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Çavuş, kurtul gitsin şundan."

languages.text: {n}Tras escucharte, Juvenna responde impasible:{/n} «Sargento, deshágase de esta gente».
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras escucharte, Juvenna responde impasible:{/n} «Sargento, deshágase de esta gente».

languages.text: {n}Nachdem sie dir zugehört hat, sagt Juvenna nüchtern:{/n} "Sergeant, beseitigt sie."
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem sie dir zugehört hat, sagt Juvenna nüchtern:{/n} "Sergeant, beseitigt sie."

languages.text: {n}ジュベナは、あなたの話に耳を傾け、冷静にこう言った。{/n}「兵長、彼らを排除してくれ」
languages.original_text: {n}After listening to you, Juvenna matter-of-factly says,{/n} "Sergeant, get rid of them."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジュベナは、あなたの話に耳を傾け、冷静にこう言った。{/n}「兵長、彼らを排除してくれ」
